mapper.select:
select * from upstream_system_connection where 1 = 1
and connection_code like concat('%', #{connectionCode}, '%')
and master_warehouse_name like concat('%', #{masterWarehouseName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by display_order asc, last_authorized_time desc, create_time desc
select * from upstream_system_connection where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_connection( connection_code, system_kind, master_warehouse_name, settlement_type, app_key_mask, app_secret_mask, app_key_ciphertext, app_secret_ciphertext, credential_key_id, status, credential_status, enabled_capabilities, display_order, last_authorized_time, last_sync_time, request_log_count, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{systemKind}, #{masterWarehouseName}, #{settlementType}, #{appKeyMask}, #{appSecretMask}, #{appKeyCiphertext}, #{appSecretCiphertext}, #{credentialKeyId}, #{status}, #{credentialStatus}, #{enabledCapabilities}, #{displayOrder}, #{lastAuthorizedTime}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{requestLogCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update upstream_system_connection set master_warehouse_name = #{masterWarehouseName}, settlement_type = #{settlementType}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_connection set app_key_mask = #{appKeyMask}, app_secret_mask = #{appSecretMask}, app_key_ciphertext = #{appKeyCiphertext}, app_secret_ciphertext = #{appSecretCiphertext}, credential_key_id = #{credentialKeyId}, credential_status = #{credentialStatus}, last_authorized_time = #{lastAuthorizedTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}
update upstream_system_connection set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}
update upstream_system_connection set display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where connection_code = #{connectionCode}

update upstream_system_connection c set c.last_sync_time = sysdate(), c.request_log_count = (select count(1) from upstream_system_request_log l where l.connection_code = #{connectionCode}), c.update_time = sysdate() where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode}
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_request_log( connection_code, trace_id, operation, endpoint, request_time, response_time, duration_ms, request_payload_redacted, response_payload_redacted, external_error_code, external_error_message, status, create_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{traceId}, #{operation}, #{endpoint}, #{requestTime}, #{responseTime}, #{durationMs}, #{requestPayloadRedacted}, #{responsePayloadRedacted}, #{externalErrorCode}, #{externalErrorMessage}, #{status}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_request_log where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, request_log_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_warehouse_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, country_code, status, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{countryCode}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update warehouse_name = values(warehouse_name), country_code = values(country_code), status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_warehouse_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, warehouse_pairing_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_logistics_channel_candidate( connection_code, warehouse_code, channel_code, channel_name, status, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{warehouseCode}, #{channelCode}, #{channelName}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update channel_name = values(channel_name), status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_logistics_channel_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by upstream_channel_code asc, create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate( connection_code, master_sku, master_product_name, status, search_text, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{masterSku}, #{masterProductName}, #{status}, #{searchText}, #{syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update master_product_name = values(master_product_name), status = values(status), search_text = values(search_text), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()

insert into upstream_system_sku_candidate( connection_code, master_sku, master_product_name, status, search_text, sync_batch_id, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.connectionCode}, #{item.masterSku}, #{item.masterProductName}, #{item.status}, #{item.searchText}, #{item.syncBatchId}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() )
on duplicate key update master_product_name = values(master_product_name), status = values(status), search_text = values(search_text), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select:
select c.*, case when p.sku_pairing_id is null then 'UNASSIGNED' else 'PAIRED' end as pairing_status, p.sku_pairing_id, p.system_sku, p.system_sku_name, p.customer_name from upstream_system_sku_candidate c left join upstream_system_sku_pairing p on p.connection_code = c.connection_code and p.master_sku = c.master_sku where c.connection_code = #{connectionCode}
and c.status = #{status}
and p.sku_pairing_id is not null
and p.sku_pairing_id is null
and c.master_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and c.master_product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and p.system_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and p.customer_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ( c.search_text like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.system_sku like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.system_sku_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.customer_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by c.update_time desc, c.master_sku asc
select * from upstream_system_sku_pairing where connection_code = #{connectionCode} order by create_time desc, sku_pairing_id desc
select * from upstream_system_sku_pairing where sku_pairing_id = #{skuPairingId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into upstream_system_sku_sync_state( connection_code, status, sync_batch_id, last_started_time, last_finished_time, last_success_time, last_error_message, next_sync_time, update_time ) values ( #{connectionCode}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{lastStartedTime}, #{lastFinishedTime}, #{lastSuccessTime}, #{lastErrorMessage}, #{nextSyncTime}, sysdate() ) on duplicate key update status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), last_started_time = values(last_started_time), last_finished_time = values(last_finished_time), last_success_time = values(last_success_time), last_error_message = values(last_error_message), next_sync_time = values(next_sync_time), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from upstream_system_sku_sync_state where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
